title: Hieracium subdoronicifolium
taxonomy: I can find some information about Hieracium subdoronicifolium.  Hieracium subdoronicifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as dandelion or hawkweed. This plant is a member of the large and diverse genus Hieracium, which consists of various species of hawkweeds. It belongs to the tribe Senecioneae, which is a group of plants that are closely related to the sunflower family. The plant's classification also places it in the order Asterales, a group of flowering plants that are characterized by their showy flowers and composite inflorescences.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
